TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Nakahama go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 148.86 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 63 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 26.59 km²), 4,089 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,583 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,601 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 88%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis, Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Nakahama go ays psgayun 6 ru 15 alang. 15 alang hani ga, Mornos , Tapowaray 或 Saranawan , Ciwkangan , Makrahay , Cidatayay , Ta´man , Polo't , Pakara'ac , Pasongan , Kolado't , Carapongay , Sadipongan , Nadan , Cikadaan , Kinanoka .
S.PHON: nakaħama ɣo mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ, βunun ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu nakaħama ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, mornos~ɕ , tapowaraj * s~ɕaranawan , ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan , makraħaj , ʦ~ʨi*atajaj , ta*man , poloʔt , pakaraʔaʦ~ʨ , pas~ɕoŋan , kola*oʔt , ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj , s~ɕa*ipoŋan , na*an , ʦ~ʨika*aan , kinanoka .
S.FORM: Nakahama go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 148.86 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 63 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 26.59 km²), 4,089 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,583 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,601 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 88%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis, Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Nakahama go ays psgayun 6 ru 15 alang. 15 alang hani ga, Mornos , Tapowaray 或 Saranawan , Ciwkangan , Makrahay , Cidatayay , Ta´man , Polo't , Pakara'ac , Pasongan , Kolado't , Carapongay , Sadipongan , Nadan , Cikadaan , Kinanoka .
S.PHON: nakaħama ɣo mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ, βunun ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu nakaħama ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, mornos~ɕ , tapowaraj * s~ɕaranawan , ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan , makraħaj , ʦ~ʨi*atajaj , ta*man , poloʔt , pakaraʔaʦ~ʨ , pas~ɕoŋan , kola*oʔt , ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj , s~ɕa*ipoŋan , na*an , ʦ~ʨika*aan , kinanoka .
